title: Handle a NaiveDateTime correctly through Oban args
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.AuditLogWorker` (queue `:audit`). Its enqueue helper `enqueue/2` takes an `actor_id` and a `%NaiveDateTime{}` timestamp. Because NaiveDateTime has no stable JSON representation, the helper must call `NaiveDateTime.to_iso8601/1` before inserting. Args use string keys `"actor_id"` and `"at"`. perform/1 destructures string keys, parses `at` with `NaiveDateTime.from_iso8601!/1`, and calls `MyApp.Audit.record(actor_id, at)`. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/audit_log_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Same pattern as Decimal, different type. Tests the general rule: non-JSON-native types need explicit serialization.
